scope.summary: Document the exact OAuth HS256/RFC 9068 contract and return token-free, distinguishable RFC 6750 diagnostics for rejected bearer tokens.
out_of_scope: Adding an OAuth token acquisition, refresh, or asymmetric/JWKS verifier.

entry_points.name: POST /mcp with externally minted bearer-token negatives
entry_points.trace: scripts/resource_budget.sh --profile test --run-id b2-oauth-core-lavendertern -- cargo test -p oraclemcp-core --test c1_oauth_literal_jwt c1_negative_tokens_are_pairwise_distinguishable_on_the_wire: 1 passed. The real HTTP OAuth path emits distinct, token-free WWW-Authenticate diagnostics for wrong typ, missing client_id, missing jti, and bad signature.

entry_points.name: ResourceServerConfig required-claim validation and reject matrix
entry_points.trace: scripts/resource_budget.sh --profile test --run-id b2-oauth-auth-lavendertern -- cargo test -p oraclemcp-auth required_rfc9068_claims_must_have_valid_shapes: 1 passed; scripts/resource_budget.sh --profile test --run-id b2-oauth-auth-lavendertern -- cargo test -p oraclemcp-auth oauth_reject_matrix_covers_every_reason_and_the_accept: 1 passed. Missing fixed RFC 9068 claim names are typed while malformed token syntax remains fail-closed.

limitations: Scoped tests only; no full-workspace gate was run for this commit.
No live OAuth issuer, Oracle instance, or external network interaction was exercised.
